LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.
                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}
    body: μrec [0] :=
            0: λ _ _ →
                 case<Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0},0> @1 of
                   λ<[]> @0
                   λ<[_]> Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} (@3 @0 @1)

Where.II:
  mutual inductive(s):
    II
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        Ֆ25c7Ֆ (0 arg(s))
        Ֆ25c6Ֆ (0 arg(s))

Where.IIՖtoII:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Where.II{0}) → Where.II{0}
    body: λ _ →
            case<Where.II{0},0> @0 of
              λ<[]> Where.II{0}{1}
              λ<[]> Where.II{0}{0}

  mutual inductive(s):
    I
